headline: ECONOMY LIVE ON PROD, GATED behind tinyverse access (owner: 'do everything to live just keep it behind the tinyverse which only I can get to'). Public site intact; economy 401/403 for non-owners. Stripe inert until keys.
launchGate: Owner directed a gated dark launch: full economy merged to main + live on tiny-world-builder.netlify.app, reachable only by the tinyverse-access allowlist (requireTinyverseAccess 403s non-owners). Verified on prod. To go FULLY public: relax the gate. Stripe (P1) needs keys; tweets need X keys; no autonomous cron (owner hasn't said yes).

pipeline.title: Wire live $TINYWORLD SPL balance into GOLD allowance
Weekly holdings-based GOLD payout (admin dry-run, idempotent)
Fix goldEvents loop-nesting bug in world-resources
Template paid-remix (Earned GOLD, atomic, author payout)
Rewards page UI (Earned GOLD balance + referral share)
Public builder profile page (/builder) — worlds + badges
Paid AI generation (metered in Earned GOLD, OpenRouter)
